news.t: Bull vs. Bear: ETFs for Rising Geopolitical Risk
T. ROWE PRICE ADDS TWO NEW INTERNATIONAL EQUITY ETFs TO ITS TRANSPARENT ACTIVE ETF OFFERINGS

holdings.infoBox: TIER is an equity ETF with a total of 398 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 3.47%, Samsung Electronics Co Ltd DR at 3.24%, SK hynix at 2.30%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 2.17%, and ASML Holding at 1.97%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price International Equity Research ETF (TIER) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 30.34m in AUM and 380 holdings. TIER seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing an international equity portfolio, excluding the US TIER was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.
